page_content:
Formerly: GERM148.

GERS149 Germanic Languages - Elementary II (3 Credits) Continuation of GERM148. May be repeated in a different language. Subtitle will reflect the language.

Prerequisite: GERM148.

Repeatable to: 6 credits.

Formerly: GERM149.

GERS169 Special Topics in Study Abroad | (1-6 Credits)

Special topics course taken as part of an approved study abroad program.

Repeatable to: 15 credits if content differs.
